messages.content: please translate it in English "ขออนุมติแก้ไขเหตุผิดสัญญาของ Bangkok Dusit Medical Services PCL จากสัญญาเงินกู้"
Please allow me to amend the breach of contract by Bangkok Dusit Medical Services PCL from the loan agreement.
please translate it in English “ขออนุมติแก้ไขเงื่อนไข Event of Default of Bangkok Dusit Medical Services PCL จากสัญญาเงินกู้”
Please request approval to amend the terms and conditions of Event of Default of Bangkok Dusit Medical Services PCL from the loan agreement.
please translate it in English "หุ้น BDMS" หมายถึง หุ้นสามัญที่ออกโดย BDMS อันเป็นกรรมสิทธิ์ของผู้กู้"
"BDMS shares" refer to common shares issued by BDMS, which are the ownership rights of the borrowers.
please translate it in English "หุ้นจำนำ หมายถึง หุ้นสามัญของบริษัทฯ จำนวน 60,000,000 หุ้น ซึ่งผู้จำนำถืออยู่"
"Pledged shares" refer to ordinary shares of the company, totaling 60,000,000 shares, held by the pledgor.

Please translate it in English "การกู้ในนามส่วนตัว แล้วมี Event of Default ถึง บริษัท Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited or BDMS (i.e bankruptcy) อาจจะมากเกินไป ผู้กู้มองว่าBDMS เป็นlisted-co ในตลาดหลักทรัพย์ ฐานะการเงินมั่นคง มีทีมมืออาชีพบริหาร (หากในอนาคตอาจารย์ปรมาภรณ์step down ไม่ได้เป็นผู้บริหาร ก็ยังมีทีมงานBDMS run ธุรกิจต่อไป) การที่ใช้คำว่า BDMS เหมือนอาจารย์ต้องแบกรับภาระทั้งหมดของบริษัท BDMS  หากอนาคตบริษัท BDMS มีปัญหา ก็มา trigger ในสัญญาเงินกู้ของCIMB ในขณะที่ผู้กู้มีเงินสดหรือหลักทรัพย์อื่นสามารถวางเป็นหลักประกันเพิ่มหรือลดหนี้ได้"

Borrowing in a personal capacity and having an Event of Default occur with regard to Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited or BDMS (i.e., bankruptcy) may be excessive. The borrower perceives BDMS as a listed company in the securities market with stable financial status and a professional management team (even if Prof. Prommarat steps down in the future and is no longer an executive, there is still a BDMS team to continue running the business). The use of the term BDMS, similar to Prof. Prommarat, would bear the full burden of the entire company BDMS. If BDMS encounters problems in the future, it may trigger the CIMB loan agreement, while the borrower has cash or other assets that can be added or reduced as collateral.

Please translate it in English "ในสัญญาจำนำหุ้นของธนาคารอื่น มีการกำหนดการรักษาคุณภาพของหลักประกัน (หุ้นBDMS in this case) เช่น ต้องไม่เลิกบริษัท, การล้มละลาย หรือฟื้นฟูกิจการ  โดยในสัญญาจะครอบคลุมเพียงแค่หุ้น BDMS ไม่ได้กำกับตัวบริษัท BDMS"

In the pledge agreement of other banks, there are provisions for maintaining the quality of the collateral (BDMS shares in this case), such as not ceasing operations, liquidating, or reviving the business. However, the agreement only covers the BDMS shares and does not govern the BDMS company itself.

Please translate it in English “ในสัญญามาตรฐานจำนำหุ้นของธนาคารมีการกำหนดให้รักษาคุณภาพของหลักประกันต่อเนื่อง (หุ้นBDMS in this case) โดยการใช้หุ้นเพื่อเป็นประกันการชำระหนี้ภายใต้สัญญาฉบับนี้เป็นหลักประกันที่ต่อเนื่องกันไปตลอดระยะเวลาและ ไม่สามารถถูกยกเลิก เพิกถอนหรือกระทบโดยการเลิกบริษัท การชำระบัญชี การมีหนี้สินล้นพ้นตัว การล้มละลาย การฟื้นฟูกิจการ การควบบริษัท การ เปลี่ยนแปลงโครงสร้างบริษัท หรือการไร้ความสามารถอื่นใด ของผู้รับหลักประกัน ผู้ให้หลักประกัน หรือลูกหนี้(หรือการเริ่มต้นของเหตุการณ์ต่าง ๆ ที่ได้กล่าวมาในข้างต้น) ทั้งนี้ เงื่อนไขในสัญญาจะครอบคลุมเพียงแค่หุ้น BDMS ไม่ได้กำกับตัวบริษัท BDMS

In the standard pledge agreement of the bank, there are provisions for continuously maintaining the quality of the collateral (BDMS shares in this case) by using the shares as security for debt repayment under this agreement. The collateral shall remain in effect throughout the period and cannot be canceled, withdrawn, or affected by the cessation of the company, accounting irregularities, excessive debt, liquidation, business revival, corporate restructuring, or any other incapacity of the guarantor, pledgee, or debtor (or the occurrence of events mentioned above). It should be noted that these conditions in the agreement only cover the BDMS shares and do not govern the BDMS company itself.

please translate it in English "พบว่าสัญญาเงินกู้ไม่มีการกล่าวถึง บริษัท BDMS ใน Event of default  มีเพียงผู้กู้, ผู้ให้หลักประกันหุ้น ที่มีภาระผูกพัน EOD ต่อสัญญาเงินกู้ ในส่วนสัญญาจำนำหุ้น กล่าวถึงข้อปฏิบัติความต่อเนื่องของคุณภาพหลักประกัน (หุ้นBDMS in this case) ทั้งนี้ไม่ได้กำกับถึงตัวบริษัท BDMS"

It is found that the loan agreement does not mention the BDMS company in the Event of Default. It only involves the borrower and the shareholder pledging the shares, which are bound by the EOD provisions under the loan agreement. As for the pledge agreement, it discusses the continuous compliance with the quality standards of the collateral (BDMS shares in this case), without governing the BDMS company itself.
please translate it in English “ในส่วนสัญญาจำนำหุ้น มีการกำหนดเงื่อนไขให้รักษาคุณภาพของหลักประกันต่อเนื่อง (หุ้นBDMS in this case) ทั้งนี้ไม่ได้กำกับถึงตัวบริษัท BDMS”

In the pledge agreement for shares, there are provisions that require continuous maintenance of the quality of the collateral (BDMS shares in this case). However, these provisions do not govern the BDMS company itself.

Please write the summary of legal comments “The main reason why BDMS is included in EOD because the collateral in this case is BDMS Shares. Therefore, the financial and business status of BDMS is important to ensure that the value of BDMS Shares can secure the Facility. Setting the events that may impact its financial and business status as EOD aim to protect the Bank so that the Bank can enforce the BDMS Shares quick enough (i.e. does not have to wait until the share price drops and trigger top up condition). Removing reference to BDMS in EOD is credit call to consider. However, please see below the legal impact for your kind consideration and information. When these EOD apply to BDMS, it means that if BDMS’s financial and business status is impacted (e.g. it defaults other financial indebtedness), the Bank can accelerate the Loan and enforce BDMS Shares immediately before the market price of the BDMS Share drops. This means that, with higher sale price of BDMS Shares, the Bank will receive higher repayment amount. Without these EOD, it means that although these facts in EOD incur, the Bank still have to wait until market price of BDMS Shares drops to the level that SCR covenant is breached. When BDMS’s Assets are expropriated by the government, it may cause the business of BDMS to stop operating. However, similar to the above, the Bank still have to wait until these facts creates negative effect to market price of BDMS Shares drops to the level that SCR covenant is breached. It is also uncertain whether the expropriation will cause all BDMS Shares to stop trading. Clause 20.16 involves three main events: 1.  Merger & Tender Offer of all BDMS Shares:  When there is a takeover of BDMS, this means that there may be a change of control (both shareholder level and management level) which may affect the price of BDMS shares. Therefore, if such event is EOD, the Bank will have the right to accelerate the Loan and enforce BDMS Shares immediately before the market price of the BDMS Share drops and can leverage from the tender offer process (e.g. tender offer price). Without this EOD, the Bank will have to wait until (i) there is a breach of shareholding undertaking; or (ii) market price of BDMS Shares drops to the level that SCR covenant is breached, before enforcement of BDMS Shares can take place. 2. Delisting: If BDMS Shares are listed in the SET, enforcement of BDMS Shares can be made via the SET which is less time consuming (e.g. the sale process is approx. 2-3 days (excluding period for sending demand notice). Delisting means that the BDMS Shares will stop trading in the SET; therefore, the enforcement of BDMS Shares via the SET will not be permissible and the enforcement will have to be made via public auction. The timeline for public auction is longer than enforcement via SET (e.g. it can potentially be more than 3 months since it involve appointing license auctioneer – period for sending demand notice). Delisting may also effect the SCR Calculation. We understand that SCR is calculated on daily basis based on closing price of the BDMS Shares in the SET. Delisting from the SET therefore may cause the Bank not to be able to calculate SCR. This EOD allows the Bank to enforce the BDMS Shares before the BDMS Shares are delisted (e.g. the EOD includes the situation when the shareholders of BDMS pass resolution for BDMS to delist). 3. Suspension of Trading Suspension of trading involves (i) status of BDMS as a company (since suspension of trading may relate to its financial or business status); and (ii) calculation of SCR. The legal impact of removing this EOD is similar to as mentioned above.”

The inclusion of BDMS in the Event of Default (EOD) is due to BDMS shares being used as collateral for the facility. This ensures that the financial and business status of BDMS is important in maintaining the value of BDMS shares as security for the bank. Setting events that may impact BDMS's financial and business status as EOD aims to protect the bank by allowing the enforcement of BDMS shares promptly, regardless of share price fluctuations.

Removing reference to BDMS in the EOD would require careful consideration. However, it is important to note the legal implications. When these EOD apply to BDMS, any impact on its financial and business status (such as defaulting on other financial indebtedness) allows the bank to accelerate the loan and enforce BDMS shares, ensuring higher repayment amounts. Without these EOD, the bank would have to wait for the market price of BDMS shares to drop below the SCR covenant breach level before enforcing the shares.

In the event of government expropriation of BDMS assets, it may cause the company to cease operations. However, without the EOD, the bank would still have to wait for this event to negatively affect the market price of BDMS shares, breaching the SCR covenant, before enforcement can occur. The impact on trading all BDMS shares due to expropriation remains uncertain.

Clause 20.16 of the agreement covers three main events: 
1. Merger and Tender Offer of all BDMS shares: If a takeover occurs, it may result in a change of control and affect the share price. With the EOD in place, the bank can enforce BDMS shares promptly, benefiting from the tender offer process. Without the EOD, enforcement would be subject to breaches of shareholding undertakings or a drop in the share price below the SCR covenant breach level before enforcement can take place.
2. Delisting: If BDMS shares are delisted from the Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET), enforcement becomes more time-consuming and must be done via public auction instead of the SET. Delisting may also impact the SCR calculation as it is based on the daily closing price on the SET. The EOD allows the bank to enforce BDMS shares before delisting occurs.
3. Suspension of Trading: This event relates to BDMS's company status and the calculation of SCR. Removing this EOD would have similar legal implications as mentioned above.

Careful consideration should be given to the legal impact before deciding to remove these EOD provisions.

please translate it in English "ลูกค้าแจ้งว่าแจ้งว่าผู้กู้จะลงนามสัญญาก็ต่อเมื่อ ธนาคารสามารถ เอาคำว่า “บริษัทBDMS” ออกจาก EOD clause ได้ same terms with other banks ลูกค้าย้ำว่าถ้าCIMB ไม่สะดวกปรับตามที่ผู้กู้ขอมา  ขอให้แจ้งกลับมาภายในสัปดาห์หน้า ทางลูกค้าจะขอสินเชื่อกับธนาคารอื่นเพื่อให้ทันเบิกกู้ 22 Dec"

The customer notifies that they will only sign the agreement when the bank is able to remove the term "BDMS company" from the EOD clause, similar to the terms offered by other banks. The customer emphasizes that if CIMB is unable to accommodate their request, they request a response within the next week. In that case, the customer will seek a loan from another bank to proceed in a timely manner. Date of notification: 22nd December.
